title: Revamped progression
description: This is a mod that revamped all the progression of minecraft and change many craft and recipe to make it more difficult and realist.
body:
This mod change all the minecraft progression every block and every craft will be revamped to be better and more realistic.

 

Basic to wood items :

 

-break grass to obtain rock

-break grass with rock and craft fiber strings

-break leaves with rock to obtain sticks

-craft with those items a basic axe

-cut some logs

-craft a cutting log

-cut the log into plank item

-craft planks

 
2 new enchants :

life mending : sacrifice hearth to make some durability the number of durability change with level of enchant

hunger mending : sacrifice hunger to make some durability the number of durability change with level of enchant

 

A wiki will is coming soon but for now you can just follow the change logs.

 

Traduction :

 

-English
